title: IdentityDescriptor
description: AITP v0.1 identity binding. Connects an AID to a verifiable issuer claim.

type.description: Identity mechanism. v0.1 supports: oidc, pinned_key

proof.description: Verifiable proof. For type=oidc: a compact-serialized JWT (RFC-AITP-0002 §2). For type=pinned_key: an unpadded base64url Ed25519 signature whose input binds sender AID, receiver AID, message_id, timestamp, and the handshake pop_nonce per RFC-AITP-0002 §3.1; the pop_nonce is sourced from the handshake envelope, not from this descriptor.

public_key.description: base64url public key. Required for pinned_key.

extensions.description: Optional extension namespace per RFC-AITP-0001 §7 and RFC-AITP-0012. Unknown keys inside `extensions` MUST be ignored; unknown fields outside it are rejected by this schema.
